A_methods:
d in discussions relative to the merits of the programs visited. The State .
supervisors in each of the five states toured, assisted with the instruction and :

A_results:
Class started

about 6:00 a.m. each day and concluded with an after supper session to 10:00-p.m.

with the host teacher of vocational agriculture describing the local program.

During the day, farming programs were analyzed on student's farms, and teachers

questioned as to techniques used.

At the close of the course, a comprehensive final examination was given and
notebooks graded. The students and professors felt the course was successful
and worthwhile. Plans are underway to offer the course again in a similar fash-
‘ion next June.
